zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Belknap於大約1330年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Sir John Belknap32歲，母親Lady Alice de Seagrave19歲。他於1365年12月2日之前與Amy結婚。他去世於1401年1月19日在英國享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特羅徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Belknap于大约1330年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Sir John Belknap32岁，母亲Lady Alice de Seagrave19岁。他于1365年12月2日之前与Amy结婚。他去世于1401年1月19日在英国享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特羅徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Belknap was born about 1330, in Kent, England, his father, Sir John Belknap, was 32 and his mother, Lady Alice de Seagrave, was 19. He married Amy before 2 December 1365. He died on 19 January 1401, in England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Rochester, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Belknap est né environ 1330, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Belknap, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Seagrave, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Amy avant 2 décembre 1365. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1401, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Rochester, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Belknap um 1330 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Belknap 32 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Seagrave 19. Er hat vor 2. Dezember 1365 Amy geheiratet. Er starb am 19. Januar 1401 im Alter von 72 Jahren in England und wurde in Rochester, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Belknap è nato il circa 1330 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Belknap, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Seagrave, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Amy prima del 2 dicembre 1365. Morì il 19 gennaio 1401, nel England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Rochester, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Belknapが約1330年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir John Belknapは32歳，母Lady Alice de Seagraveは19歳であった。1365年12月2日以前にAmyと結婚した。彼は1401年1月19日にイギリスで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントロチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Belknap(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Belknap(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Seagrave(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1365년 12월 2일 이전 Amy(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1401년 1월 19일 영국에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 록헤스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Belknap nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Belknap, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Seagrave, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy antes 2 de dezembro de 1365. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1401, em Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Rochester, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Belknap родился около 1330 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Belknap было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Seagrave, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy перед 2 декабрь 1365 г. Он умер 19 января 1401 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности рошестир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Belknap nació aproximadamente 1330, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Belknap, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Seagrave, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Amy antes de 2 de diciembre de 1365. Murió el 19 de enero de 1401, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Rochester, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
